LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER INSTRUCTING CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE MINI-MINUTES AND WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order Instructing Clerk To Enter Default And Default Judgment is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Continued To Jul-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
